XOnlineFriendsRevokeGameInvite

Revokes a pending game invitation issued to a specified list of friends.

Note    It is recommended that titles use XOnlineGameInviteRevoke instead of this method.

HRESULT XOnlineFriendsRevokeGameInvite(
    DWORD dwUserIndex,
    XNKID SessionID,
    DWORD dwFriendListCount,
    const XONLINE_FRIEND *pToFriendList
);

Parameters

dwUserIndex
[in] Controller index (zero-based) of the user revoking the invite. The user must have been successfully logged on with a previous call to XOnlineLogon.
SessionID
[in] Game session identifier of the game invitation to revoke. This identifier must match the one used in the call to XOnlineFriendsGameInvite when the game invitation was sent.
dwFriendListCount
[in] Number of friends in the pToFriendList array.
pToFriendList
[in] Pointer to an array of XONLINE_FRIEND structures specifying the friends whose invitations should be revoked.

Return Values

If XOnlineFriendsRevokeGameInvite succeeds, the return value is S_OK.

If XOnlineFriendsRevokeGameInvite fails, the return value is one of the following error codes.

Value Description
XONLINE_E_NOTIFICATION_TOO_MANY_REQUESTS Too many pending requests to service. To avoid this error, pump the handle returned by XOnlineFriendsStartup more frequently. If you get this error during a game, pump the handle returned by XOnlineFriendsStartup, and then call XOnlineFriendsRevokeGameInvite again.
XONLINE_E_NOTIFICATION_NO_TASK The friends startup task is not active. You must first call XOnlineFriendsStartup to create the startup task.
E_OUTOFMEMORY Insufficient memory. Free some memory.
Other See Online Errors for information about other possible errors.

If the function succeeds, the return value is S_OK.

Remarks

The task returned by the XOnlineFriendsEnumerate function must be active at the time the title calls the XOnlineFriendsRevokeGameInvite function.

Pump the task returned by XOnlineFriendsStartup in order to carry out the revocation.

Passing in a value of zero for dwFriendListCount and a value of NULL for pToFriendList revokes all invitations sent by this player. In this case only, the task returned by XOnlineFriendsEnumerate need not be active when calling XOnlineFriendsRevokeGameInvite.

XOnlineFriendsRevokeGameInvite cannot revoke an invitation if the receiving player has enumerated their friends list since receiving the invitation.

Setting the sessionID parameter to zero in a call to XOnlineNotificationSetState automatically expires all previously sent invitations, regardless of whether they have been enumerated by the receiving player.

Requirements

Header: Declared in Xonline.h.

Import Library: Use Xonline.lib.

See Also

Xbox Live Functions | Friends Lists | XOnlineFriendsGameInvite, XOnlineFriendsAnswerGameInvite, XOnlineFriendsStartup
